basics.name: Hanlin Li
basics.summary: M.S. student in Artificial Intelligence at HUST. Research on trustworthy ML.

education.institution: Huazhong University of Science and Technology
Huazhong University of Science and Technology

publications.name: Why Feature Magnitude Deceives OOD Detectors: An Angular Separation Perspective
publications.summary: Reveals why feature magnitude misleads OOD detectors and proposes an angular separation perspective.

publications.name: PTTA: Purifying Malicious Samples for Test-Time Model Adaptation
publications.summary: Proposes a method that purifies malicious samples for robust test-time model adaptation.

publications.name: Decoupled Entropy Minimization
publications.summary: Proposes decoupled entropy minimization for improved test-time adaptation and domain generalization.

publications.name: Frequency-Aware Domain Generalization
publications.summary: Introduces a frequency-aware approach for domain generalization.
